payloadFactory.format: { "errorCode": "400", "errorMessage": "The claim with Claim ID $1 is currently in '$2' status. Only claims in 'APPLIED' status are eligible for accept.", "errorDetails": "The claim with Claim ID $1 is currently in '$2' status. Only claims in 'APPLIED' status are eligible for accept.", "transactionId": "$3", "timeStamp": "$4" }
